name: repo-commit-helper
description: Repo-local commit helper for the cuda-algorithm-lab CUDA examples and visualizations repository.

interface.shortDescription: Draft repo-aware Conventional Commit messages for this CUDA repo
interface.longDescription: Analyzes staged changes deeply, asks whether to stage all current files when nothing is staged, and prepares or helps execute Conventional Commits for this CUDA kernels, algorithms, and visualization repository.
defaultPrompt: Use $repo-commit-helper to prepare a commit for the current repo.
Use $repo-commit-helper to draft a Conventional Commit from staged changes.
Use $repo-commit-helper to commit current CUDA or visualization work and ask to stage all if nothing is staged.
